reminder.notes:
Release v2.18.22

Fixes two real crashes caught by Crashlytics during v2.18.18's brief testing window:

1. A rare startup race where a reminder's image thumbnail could be accessed before its storage directory was ready, crashing with "ensureDir() must run before fileFor()".
2. A Google Sign-In configuration error on some devices could crash the whole app instead of just falling back to the cached session.
